title: Election 2026 LIVE: Assam records 38.92% till 11am, brisk voting underway in Kerala, Puducherry
description: Assembly Elections 2026 Voting LIVE: Voting in Kerala, Assam and Puducherry started at 7am and will continue till 6pm. Meanwhile, voting for bypolls is also underway in Karnataka, Nagaland and Tripura.
